title: zeia mollis
intro: Zeia mollis, also known as the velvet-leaved zeia, is a flowering plant in the family Ebenaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zeia mollis are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable natural remedy in traditional medicine. Zeia mollis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
